arts.ttl: Wrexham splash the cash to boost Championship promotion hopes with transfer coup
arts.sum: Wrexham have beaten off competition from the Championship to land Hull City forward Ryan Longman, who had been the subject of strong interest from Oxford United

arts.ttl: Player lined up for move to Plymouth Argyle after failed transfer to Birmingham City
arts.sum: According to a claim in the Dutch media, Plymouth Argyle are showing serious interest in Sparta Rotterdam defender Mike Eerdhuijzen. The 24-year-old was linked with transfer to Birmingham City during the last transfer window, but a move to St Andrew’s never materialised due to a failed medical. De Telegraaf today report on the latest developments The post Player lined up for move to Plymouth Argyle after failed transfer to Birmingham City appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Ryan Reynolds outguns Birmingham's Tom Brady as Wrexham owner's net worth soars
arts.sum: Ryan Reynolds' Wrexham host Tom Brady's Birmingham City in a League One promotion battle on Thursday, with the two high-profile figures' net worths compared

arts.ttl: Wrexham star James McClean involved in car crash on way to training
arts.sum: The Ireland international is undergoing medical checks after being involved in a single-car incident

arts.ttl: Wrexham co-owner Ryan Reynolds is worth more than Tom Brady despite £304million FOX deal
arts.sum: Tom Brady's Birmingham City are currently leading the way in the League One title race, but Deadpool star and Wrexham co-owner Ryan Reynolds has the higher net worth of the two

arts.ttl: Birmingham City transfer target set to finally complete move to England
arts.sum: Birmingham City summer transfer target Mike Eerdhuijzen is finally set to complete a move to England in this January window - and he is set to join Championship strugglers Plymouth Argyle. Now, however, a deal appears to have been struck between Plymouth and Eerdhuijzen's existing club Sparta Rotterdam in the Dutch Eredivisie.

arts.ttl: McClean in road accident on way to Wrexham training
arts.sum: Wrexham captain James McClean will be assessed by the club's medical team after he was involved in a car accident on his way to training.

arts.ttl: James McClean 'involved in car accident' as Wrexham star undergoes medical checks following smash
arts.sum: The veteran winger was involved in an incident on his way to training with the Welsh side

arts.ttl: Chris Davies gives Paik and Iwata latest in Birmingham City injury update pre-Wrexham
arts.sum: Chris Davies has ruled Paik Seung-ho and Willum Willumsson out of the Wrexham clash – and Birmingham City are also expected to be without Tomoki Iwata. “Willum is still a little way away and not available,” Davies confirmed pre-Wrexham.

arts.ttl: Wrexham star James McClean involved in car crash on way to training
arts.sum: The incident occurred on Wednesday morning
